content.en:
Taboo Zerg Nest, Taboo Bug Tree.

Originally, there were three lord-level forbidden insect cocoons on the Forbidden Insect Tree, but at this moment, there were still two lord-level forbidden insect cocoons.

In addition, the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg is still guarding here, and there are eight lord-level forbidden zergs in the outside world, if these two lord-level forbidden insect cocoons are bred, the forbidden zerg will have 12 lord-level forbidden zergs.

Abrupt.

A lord-level forbidden insect cocoon began to crack, and a golden long foot poked out of it, and immediately a hideous-looking lord-level forbidden insect appeared, and a terrifying aura permeated the void in all directions.

This means that the Forbidden Zerg has given birth to another lord-level Forbidden Zerg.

Soon after, the second lord-level forbidden insect cocoon also began to shatter, and the second lord-level forbidden insect appeared.

The newly born lord-level forbidden zerg was the weakest time, but as the taboo zerg sent various energy resources, they were devoured by these two lord-level forbidden zergs, making their carapaces stronger and stronger, and their breath becoming stronger and more powerful and stable.

Eventually, they grew up completely.

Maybe they are still a little weaker than other lord-level forbidden zergs, but they are definitely not weaker than ordinary half-step domain ancestors.

Soon after, the aura of the Forbidden Insect Tree began to wilt a little, but the Lord-level Forbidden Insect Clan did not panic at all.

Soon, one by one, the cocoons began to burst, and the dense taboo zerg came out of the cocoons.

In a short time, nearly 5 million forbidden zergs were born.

Originally, the number of taboo zergs was about 12 million, and now another 5 million taboo zergs were born all of a sudden, which means that the number of taboo zergs has reached 17 million.

Suddenly.

The three-headed lord-level Forbidden Zerg inside the Forbidden Zerg lair led a large number of Forbidden Zerg to fly towards the outside of the Forbidden Zerg lair, leaving only one lord-level Forbidden Zerg and a part of the Forbidden Zerg to guard the Forbidden Zerg lair and the Forbidden Bug Tree.

Outside the Zerg nest is contraindicated.

A Lord-level Forbidden Zerg has returned, and a large number of Forbidden Zerg have also gathered here.

This area is almost covered by forbidden zergs, and the number is gradually approaching 12 million.

11 lord-level forbidden zergs, 12 million ordinary taboo zergs, elite-level taboo zergs, and more than 50 commander-level taboo zergs.

The convergence of so many taboo zergs is naturally not to have a meeting, but to start a war.

Whew!!

The 11 lord-level forbidden zerg roared, and the forbidden zerg army was dispatched and flew towards a certain base in the Daoshan realm.

They're going to attack the base!

For a long time, the Forbidden Zerg has been slowly depleting the way of playing, thus attacking the major bases in the Passage Mountain Realm, but this time it has changed its strategy.

There is no doubt that this has something to do with the birth of the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg.

The Forbidden Zerg and the major bases of the Daoshan Realm are constantly fighting, making the Forbidden Zerg think that there are only eight half-step domain ancestors in the major bases, if there are more half-step domain ancestors, why didn't they make a move before?

Even if the Forbidden Zerg had a wise Zerg, they would not have thought that there would be a hidden in the Dao Mountain Realm.

Therefore, they believed that their side dispatched 11 lord-level forbidden zergs, plus 12 million forbidden zerg troops, which was enough to wipe out the bases in the Daoshan Realm, so as to completely attack the Daoshan Realm.

......

Fatten's base.

This base established by the Mitian Sect is also one of the top bases among the many bases, guarded by the Migu Dao Ancestor, a half-step domain ancestor, as well as several invincible Dao Ancestors and many supreme Dao Ancestors, and the strength is very strong.

Now.

Migu Daozu is probing the situation in the territory around the Mitian base.

Suddenly, he received a summons from the Dao Ancestors who were hunting the Forbidden Zerg in the Dark Forbidden Domain.

"What, the large-scale mobilization of the forbidden zerg seems to be coming towards the Mitian base!"

Migu Daozu's expression changed drastically.

This is not a trivial matter, once it is really attacking their Mitian Base, it will not be able to stop it at all with the strength of the Mitian Base!

"Help!"

Migu Daozu asked for help from bases such as the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Black Wind Mountain, Wanyu Temple, and Tianhai Sect one by one, asking them to come to the Mitian Base to support and prepare for a battle with the upcoming Forbidden Zerg.

It is naturally impossible for the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Black Wind Mountain and other forces to sit back and watch the Mitian Base being breached, after all, the Mitian Base is also one of the important lines of defense, once it is breached, there will be no defensive force in this direction, and the Taboo Zerg is likely to directly attack the Daoshan Realm.

Besides, without the power of the Mitian base, the major bases will lose a combat power, which is not a good thing.

And so.

The Dao Ancestors of one base after another came to the Mitian Base, and many of the bases almost sent most of their forces.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

Ye Tian also got the news and led a large number of Dao Ancestors to rush to the Mitian Base.

This time, his body and the copy body of the Dark King were all dispatched, and his wife Xiao Yue was cultivating in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and she was not currently in the Black Wind Mountain base, so she did not go to support, but her son and daughter were in the Black Wind Mountain base, so they followed Ye Tian to support.

The Forbidden Zerg army was too numerous, so before the Dao Ancestors of the major bases gathered, they didn't dare to fight with them alone, so they could only fight with the Forbidden Army after they converged at the Mitian Base.

The several bases that are relatively close to the Mitian base have arrived one by one, and the other half-step domain ancestors are the first to arrive, otherwise as soon as those lord-level forbidden zergs make a move, the Migu Dao Ancestor may not be able to stop it, and they will be killed in a short time.

"Migu Dao Ancestor, do you understand the situation of the Forbidden Zerg army this time?"

The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace arrived and asked Migu Dao Ancestor.

"The number of forbidden zergs is about 12 million, as for the lord-level forbidden zerg, there are only nine heads spied on at present, but it is not only the nine-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, then it is not very clear!" said Migu Daozu.

"Nine-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, if there are only nine heads, then the pressure is not too great, if there is one more, this battle will be very difficult to fight!"

"Anyway, block it first!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke.

As time slowly passed, the Forbidden Zerg army arrived.

From a distance, these forbidden Zerg armies were surging at a terrifying speed like a surging black tide, as if a single wave could flood the entire Mitian Base.

And outside the Mitian Base, eight half-step domain ancestors and a large number of Dao ancestors have basically arrived.

Amazing arrays have been arranged, waiting for these forbidden zerg armies.

Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue stayed in one direction, staring into the distance.

"It's hard to win!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Forbidden Zerg is prepared, and it must be completely certain, if the major bases only have this little power, it is estimated that they will collapse soon.

Of course.

Whether it is the Heavenly Emperor Palace, or the Black Wind Mountain, there is a hidden power.

This time, whether the hidden power will appear or not depends on the situation of this battle!
